name: agent-browser-integration-testing
description: Browser automation and end-to-end integration testing through the agent-browser CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Run browser automation and end-to-end tests.
interface.longDescription: Inspect web applications, execute browser workflows, collect evidence, and generate structured integration test reports with agent-browser.
defaultPrompt: Run an end-to-end test for this web application.
Inspect this page and report functional issues.
Execute a browser smoke test and collect evidence.
